summary: Joel Spolsky briefly announces that the company formerly known as Stack Overflow has been renamed to Stack Exchange. The post is essentially a teaser that directs readers to the Stack Overflow blog for the full explanation. It includes a photo of the snack room at the newly-named Stack Exchange office. The post is minimal in content, serving more as a pointer than a standalone article.
key_points: The parent company behind Stack Overflow rebranded to Stack Exchange
The post redirects readers to the official Stack Overflow blog for details on the name change
The announcement is made casually, referencing a snack room upgrade as the visual hook
money_quotes: The snack room at Stack Exchange got a wee upgrade today.
key_insight: Stack Overflow the company rebranded to Stack Exchange to reflect its expansion beyond a single Q&A site into a network of communities.
